title: cota dubia
intro: Cota dubia, also known as the False Cota or False Cota Daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cota dubia include relief from various ailments such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Cota dubia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
